channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Why Trump decided to back Iraq’s prime minister-designate, Ali al-Zaidi
item.description: Support from Washington is conditional on clear progress in curbing pro-Iran militia activity.

item.title: Gunshots ring out at Philippine Senate where lawmaker is holed up
item.description: Ronald dela Rosa, former police chief under ex-President Rodrigo Duterte, faces an ICC arrest warrant.

item.title: Activist confronts Iran’s former crown prince over war on Iran
item.description: Activist confronts Iran’s former crown prince over war on Iran

item.title: Israeli attacks on Gaza increased by 35% since Iran ceasefire: Report
item.description: Conflict monitor ACLED notes the increase in Israeli attacks on Gaza in April in its latest report.

item.title: Key Zelenskyy aides under corruption cloud: What are they accused of?
item.description: Andriy Yermak, Zelenskyy’s ex-aide, faces $10.5m corruption charges tied to a luxury real estate project near Kyiv.

item.title: Maldives jails two journalists for reporting on president’s alleged affair
item.description: Rights groups condemn jailing of journalists for violating a gag order on allegations against President Mohamed Muizzu.

item.title: Trump faces slew of ‘bad options’ on Iran as diplomacy falters
item.description: Trump faces mounting pressure amid stalled Iran peace talks as domestic discontent grows and geopolitical stakes rise.

item.title: UN urges independent probes into deadly Nigeria, Chad air attacks
item.description: UN rights chief 'shocked' by reports that Nigerian and Chadian forces killed over 100 civilians and seeks inquiries.

item.title: Israel bulldozes Palestinian shops to make way for settlement-linked road
item.description: Israel bulldozes Palestinian shops to make way for settlement-linked road

item.title: Gang violence displaces hundreds in Haiti’s capital
item.description: People in Cite Soleil neighbourhood of Port-au-Prince protest as gang violence shuts hospitals and displaces hundreds.

item.title: Video: Putin hails test launch of ‘world’s most powerful missile’
item.description: Russia has test-fired a new weapon that President Putin has described as the world’s ‘most powerful’ missile.

item.title: At least eight killed in Israeli drone strikes on Lebanon highway
item.description: Two children among those killed after three strikes hit cars on the highway in Jiyeh, south of Beirut.

item.title: The class politics of modern outbreaks
item.description: The MV Hondius hantavirus scare revived debates about luxury travel, public health and unequal vulnerability to disease.

item.title: Series of tremors near Tehran renews concerns over major quake risk
item.description: The tremors have been felt in an area close to the Mosha fault, one of Iran’s most active seismic zones.

item.title: UN resolution calls for freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: UN resolution calls for freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Jason Collins, first openly gay active NBA player, dies after cancer battle
item.description: The 213cm centre, who publicly came out as gay in 2013, had been battling a brain tumour.

item.title: How Silicon Valley giants are turning into war contractors
item.description: Palantir, Anduril, Google and other tech giants are selling AI-powered, computer-guided weapons systems.

item.title: Messi doubles MLS base salary to make $28m a year at Inter Miami
item.description: Miami and Argentina player earns more than twice as much as the second-highest-paid player in Major League Soccer.

item.title: China’s Xi expected to press Trump on Taiwan, tariffs during summit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping likely to seek concessions on arms sales to Taiwan, analysts say.

item.title: Iran war day 75: Trump-Xi talks loom in Beijing as tensions rise in Gulf
item.description: Trump heads to Beijing for high-stakes talks with Xi Jinping as tensions over the Iran war continue to escalate.

item.title: Wembanyama returns, Spurs rout Wolves for 3-2 lead in NBA Playoff series
item.description: Wembanyama scores 27 points on return from ejection as San Antonio Spurs beat Minnesota Timberwolves 126-97 in Game 5.

item.title: UK’s Starmer faces challenge as resignation calls overshadow King’s speech
item.description: UK PM, who is battling to remain in his job amid the resignations of ministers, held talks with his health secretary.

item.title: Trump and Xi to meet in Beijing: The key issues shaping the China summit
item.description: Trump and Xi meet as trade, Taiwan and the Iran war dominate a high-stakes US-China summit.

item.title: Tens of thousands protest in Argentina over Milei university cuts
item.description: Argentines protest Javier Milei’s deep cuts to tuition-free universities as staff wages plunge and funding law stalls.

item.title: US-China head-to-head: Explained in 11 maps and charts
item.description: Before President Trump’s visit to Beijing, Al Jazeera compares the US and China on economics, military and resources.
